channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Why is India blocking film on a man who counted Punjab insurgency killings?
item.description: Satluj, based on life and murder of rights activist Jaswant Singh Khalra, is still finding its audience despite the ban.

item.title: Trump threatens to attack ‘Pickaxe Mountain’ a nuclear facility inside Ira
item.description: US President Donald Trump is threatening to attack a heavily-fortified underground nuclear facility in Iran

item.title: ‘Beijing is laughing’ at US-Mexico-Canada stalled trade talks
item.description: A US trade expert says the US, Mexico, and Canada need to hold trilateral talks to get a cross-border trade deal signed.

item.title: Birthday present for Spain’s Yamal? World Cup semifinal win over France
item.description: Yamal wants to celebrate his 19th birthday by taking Spain to the World Cup final in New York.

item.title: Mexico’s Sheinbaum announces criminal charges request in US over ICE deaths
item.description: Mexico to formally ask prosecutors to file cases in US courts over its citizens' deaths in immigration operations.

item.title: Houthis: Saudi airport targeted in retaliation for strikes on Sanaa airport
item.description: Yemen's Houthis say they struck Saudi Arabia's Abha airport in retaliation for a strike on Sanaa’s international airport

item.title: Brazil court bars Bolsonaro’s son from visiting ex-president for 90 days
item.description: Top court bars former President Jair Bolsonaro's son from visiting his father under house arrest over social media post.

item.title: ‘Kylian is fine’: France ready, full-strength for Spain World Cup semifinal
item.description: French coach Deschamps says his team will be fully prepared for a midfield battle against the European champions.

item.title: Oil prices hit 1-month high as US-Iran attacks dim Strait of Hormuz outlook
item.description: Brent crude nears $85 a barrel amid renewed hostiles between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: ICE officer kills motorist in Maine; the second fatality in a week
item.description: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer has fatally shot a motorist in Maine.

item.title: Hungary’s parliament votes to oust president in latest anti-Orban move
item.description: Hungarian parliament passes amendment that would remove President Sulyok, appointed under ex-Prime Minister Orban.

item.title: Trump demands payment to protect Gulf nations from Iranian attacks
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US should be paid by ‘rich’ oil-producing Gulf nations to secure the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Record El Niño threatens to unleash floods across East Africa and Asia
item.description: Aid groups warn a record-strength El Niño could unleash flooding and hunger from Somalia to Pakistan.

item.title: Indonesia’s jailing of Gojek founder raises fears for investor confidence
item.description: Authorities say Nadiem Makarim abused his authority to favour Google in the procurement of laptops for school kids.

item.title: How Kenyan volunteers hunt polio’s hidden trail
item.description: Community health volunteers travel across remote northern Kenya to detect poliovirus before it can spread.

item.title: Iran war live: US launches more attacks; UAE says 1 killed in tanker strike
item.description: Tehran claims retaliatory strikes on Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan, as well as two oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Hundreds of experts warn the world must prepare now for AI’s impact
item.description: More than 200 economists and AI researchers call on leaders to immediately prepare for sweeping economic disruption.

item.title: Three Palestinians killed, 15 wounded in Israeli attacks across Gaza
item.description: Israel shows no sign of letting up its attacks on the devastated Palestinian territory, despite a 'ceasefire' in place.

item.title: Norway ‘rows’ at the royal palace to welcome back World Cup heroes
item.description: More than 100,000 people turned out to celebrate Norway's national football team after their World Cup exit.

item.title: Backed by Trump, Lindsey Graham’s sister Darline will replace him in Senate
item.description: South Carolina governor chooses Darline Graham Nordone to serve the rest of the late US senator's term until early 2027.

item.title: Nine deaths tied to Trump’s immigration enforcement operations in US
item.description: Fatal shooting in Biddeford, Maine, is latest in at least nine deaths linked to US president's immigration crackdown.

item.title: Haaland’s Norway receive heroes’ welcome in Oslo after World Cup exit
item.description: A crowd of more than 100,000, an open-top bus parade and a royal reception welcomed back the Norwegian World Cup squad.

item.title: Police in South Africa open probe into post-World Cup death of Jayden Adams
item.description: The country's football players' union confirmed Adams's death on Saturday, but the cause has not been revealed.

item.title: US, Iran exchange attacks around Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Washington and Tehran both claim to be in control of the strategic waterway as fighting escalates.

item.title: Lindsey Graham’s legacy: Israel advocate, Trump ally, Iran war supporter
item.description: Late US senator backed invasion of Iraq, war on Iran and approach of 'more for Israel' as he became a Trump confidant.
